decision_points.description: Uses the canonical P1/P2/P3 alkaline lysis buffer sequence.

citations.title: A rapid alkaline extraction procedure for screening recombinant plasmid DNA
citations.tier_justification: Birnboim-Doly canonical alkaline lysis plasmid miniprep paper.

decision_points.description: Lysis duration is within the 1-5 min window to avoid genomic-DNA contamination.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook recommends lysis within 5 min to avoid genomic-DNA contamination.

decision_points.description: Purification uses an accepted method (silica column is standard).

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook confirms silica-membrane column as the standard miniprep purification method.

decision_points.description: Elution volume is at least 30 uL to avoid matrix carryover.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook recommends 30-50 uL elution volume.

decision_points.description: Culture volume is within the 1-10 mL standard miniprep range.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook recommends 1-5 mL overnight culture for standard miniprep.

wrong_buffer_sequence.canonical_diagnosis: Buffer sequence did not follow the canonical P1 (resuspension) / P2 (alkaline SDS lysis) / P3 (neutralization) order.
acceptable_variants: Lysis must follow the P1/P2/P3 alkaline lysis sequence.
The non-canonical buffer order prevented proper alkaline lysis.

citations.title: A rapid alkaline extraction procedure for screening recombinant plasmid DNA

overlysis_genomic_contamination.canonical_diagnosis: Lysis exceeded 5 min, leading to genomic DNA contamination.
acceptable_variants: Excessive P2 incubation caused genomic DNA shearing and contamination.
The lysate was held in alkaline SDS too long; genomic contamination is likely.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook

wrong_purification_method.canonical_diagnosis: An unrecognised purification method was used; the standard is silica-column spin purification.
acceptable_variants: The purification method used is not a standard miniprep column.
Silica-column (or anion-exchange column) purification should have been used.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook defines silica-column as the standard method.
